headline: Should WM’s Softer Revenue Outlook Reshape Its Technology and Efficiency Investment Narrative?
summary: Earlier this week, Waste Management (NYSE: WM) reported quarterly results after the bell, following a prior quarter in which it fell short of analysts’ revenue and adjusted operating income estimates and entered this season with expectations for year-on-year revenue growth of 4.4%. This latest earnings release comes as investors weigh whether the company can stabilize performance after a slower prior quarter and meet more modest growth expectations. With Waste Management’s upcoming earnings...
